# GitFoundry

> GitFoundry is a UK web design studio that builds precision hand-coded static websites for sole traders, small consultancies, freelancers, and charities. Websites are hosted free on GitHub Pages. Clients pay once and own the source code outright — no monthly fees, no platform lock-in, ever. Every build includes a handover packet (owner's manual, walkthrough recording, runbook, migration playbook, 90-day support) so clients can operate the site themselves after delivery.

GitFoundry is based in Trentham, Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, and works with clients across the United Kingdom. Every site is written from scratch in plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no WordPress, no Squarespace, no page builders. Sites are optimised to score 90+ on Google Lighthouse.

## Services

- **Foundation** (£149) — A focused, single-page website for UK sole traders who need a credible online presence. Live in 3–5 working days. Full handover packet included.
- **Working Site** (£399) — A multi-page website (up to 5 pages) for freelancers and consultancies that need to win work. SEO fundamentals, schema markup, analytics, performance optimisation. Typical delivery: 7 working days. Full handover packet included.
- **Bespoke** (£749+) — A fully custom build with no scope constraints, up to 12 pages with more by quote. Custom design, advanced SEO, extended 6-month support window. Pricing and timeline agreed at brief stage.

All prices include UK VAT. One-time payment. No monthly fees. No recurring charges. The only ongoing cost is the client's own domain renewal (around £12/year), paid directly to a registrar like Namecheap or Porkbun — not to GitFoundry.

## Key differentiators

- **The handover packet** — every build ships with the live site, the Git repository transferred to the client's account, a plain-English owner's manual specific to their site, a 30-minute walkthrough recording, a one-page emergency runbook, a migration playbook (for moving to another host in under an hour), and a 90-day post-launch support window
- **Hand-coded** — every site built from scratch, no templates or CMS
- **No monthly fees** — GitHub Pages hosting is free, permanent, and provided by Microsoft
- **Source code ownership** — full repository transferred to client on delivery
- **UK-based** — Trentham, Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire; works with clients nationwide
- **Fast** — Foundation sites live in 3–5 days; Working Site in 7 working days
- **Performance** — 90+ Lighthouse scores as standard
- **Portable** — sites can be redeployed to Cloudflare Pages, Netlify, GitLab Pages, or any other static host in under an hour

## Sectors served

GitFoundry has published case studies on building websites for the following professions:

- [Tradesperson / self-employed builder](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-003-the-tradesperson.html)
- [Solicitor / legal professional](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-004-the-solicitor.html)
- [Physiotherapist / sports therapist](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-005-the-physiotherapist.html)
- [Photographer](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-006-the-photographer.html)
- [Private tutor](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-007-the-tutor.html)
- [Accountant / bookkeeper](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-008-the-accountant.html)
- [Personal trainer / fitness coach](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-009-the-personal-trainer.html)
- [Counsellor / therapist](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-010-the-counsellor.html)
- [Florist](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-011-the-florist.html)
- [Architect](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-012-the-architect.html)
- [Driving instructor](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-013-the-driving-instructor.html)

## Get started

Submit a project brief at [gitfoundry.co.uk/brief.html](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/brief.html). GitFoundry responds within 48 hours with a fixed quote and timeline.

## Contact

- Email: info@gitfoundry.co.uk
- Web: https://gitfoundry.co.uk
- Location: Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, United Kingdom
